'''zonashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabossed|cabossed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabossed|cabossed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zonashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonashithi|zonashithi]] || [[word:zonashiji|zonashiji]] || [[word:zonashishi|zonashishi]] || [[word:zonashiki|zonashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonashuthuthu|zonashuthuthu]] || [[word:zonashujuju|zonashujuju]] || [[word:zonashushushu|zonashushushu]] || [[word:zonashukuku|zonashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonashuthu|zonashuthu]] || [[word:zonashuju|zonashuju]] || [[word:zonashushu|zonashushu]] || [[word:zonashuku|zonashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonashufthuf|zonashufthuf]] || [[word:zonashufjuf|zonashufjuf]] || [[word:zonashufshuf|zonashufshuf]] || [[word:zonashufkuf|zonashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonashethe|zonashethe]] || [[word:zonasheje|zonasheje]] || [[word:zonasheshe|zonasheshe]] || [[word:zonasheke|zonasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonashothotho|zonashothotho]] || [[word:zonashojojo|zonashojojo]] || [[word:zonashoshosho|zonashoshosho]] || [[word:zonashokoko|zonashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonashotho|zonashotho]] || [[word:zonashojo|zonashojo]] || [[word:zonashosho|zonashosho]] || [[word:zonashoko|zonashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonashofthof|zonashofthof]] || [[word:zonashofjof|zonashofjof]] || [[word:zonashofshof|zonashofshof]] || [[word:zonashofkof|zonashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfthĂŻf|zonashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfjĂŻf|zonashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfshĂŻf|zonashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfkĂŻf|zonashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zonashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zonashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zonashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zonashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfthĂŻf|zonashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfjĂŻf|zonashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfshĂŻf|zonashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfkĂŻf|zonashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfthĂŻf|zonashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfjĂŻf|zonashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfshĂŻf|zonashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zonashĂŻfkĂŻf|zonashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zonashĂŠthĂŠ|zonashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zonashĂŠjĂŠ|zonashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zonashĂŠshĂŠ|zonashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zonashĂŠkĂŠ|zonashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zonashathatha|zonashathatha]] || [[word:zonashajaja|zonashajaja]] || [[word:zonashashasha|zonashashasha]] || [[word:zonashakaka|zonashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zonashatha|zonashatha]] || [[word:zonashaja|zonashaja]] || [[word:zonashasha|zonashasha]] || [[word:zonashaka|zonashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zonashafthaf|zonashafthaf]] || [[word:zonashafjaf|zonashafjaf]] || [[word:zonashafshaf|zonashafshaf]] || [[word:zonashafkaf|zonashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zonashasha|zonashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonashĂ«sha|zonashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonashrosha|zonashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonashmusha|zonashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonashyasha|zonashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonashnkshĂ«sha|gozonashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonashnkrosha|gozonashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonashnkmusha|gozonashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonashnkyasha|gozonashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zonanashasha|zonanashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonanashĂ«sha|zonanashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonanashrosha|zonanashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonanashmusha|zonanashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonanashyasha|zonanashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonanashnkshĂ«sha|gozonanashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonanashnkrosha|gozonanashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonanashnkmusha|gozonanashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonanashnkyasha|gozonanashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zenĂŠshasha|zenĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zenĂŠshĂ«sha|zenĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zenĂŠshrosha|zenĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zenĂŠshmusha|zenĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zenĂŠshyasha|zenĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozenĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gozenĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozenĂŠshnkrosha|gozenĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozenĂŠshnkmusha|gozenĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozenĂŠshnkyasha|gozenĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zonfashasha|zonfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zonfashĂ«sha|zonfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zonfashrosha|zonfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zonfashmusha|zonfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zonfashyasha|zonfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozonfashnkshĂ«sha|gozonfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozonfashnkrosha|gozonfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozonfashnkmusha|gozonfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozonfashnkyasha|gozonfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
